ddls:
CREATE TABLE "training_programs" (
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each training program */,
  "program_name" TEXT /* Name of the training program */,
  "program_type" TEXT /* Type of the training program (e.g., online, offline, hybrid) */,
  "program_level" TEXT /* Level of the training program (e.g., beginner, intermediate, advanced) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the training program */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the training program */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the training program */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cohorts" (
  "cohort_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cohort */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the training program */,
  "cohort_name" TEXT /* Name of the cohort */,
  "cohort_description" TEXT /* Description of the cohort */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the cohort */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the cohort */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instructor assigned to the cohort */,
  "cohort_status" TEXT /* Status of the cohort (e.g., active, inactive, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cohort_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cohorts_instructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("instructor_id") REFERENCES instructors ("instructor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cohorts_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES training_programs ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the training program */,
  "course_name" TEXT /* Name of the course */,
  "course_format" TEXT /* Format of the course (e.g., video, text, interactive) */,
  "course_difficulty" TEXT /* Difficulty level of the course */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the course */,
  "total_hours" REAL /* Total hours allocated for the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES training_programs ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "modules" (
  "module_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each module */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the course */,
  "module_name" TEXT /* Name of the module */,
  "module_description" TEXT /* Description of the module */,
  "week" TEXT /* Week in which the module is taught */,
  "module_status" TEXT /* Status of the module (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("module_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_modules_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "topics" (
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each topic */,
  "module_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the module */,
  "topic_name" TEXT /* Name of the topic */,
  "topic_description" TEXT /* Description of the topic */,
  "hours" REAL /* Number of hours allocated for the topic */,
  "topic_status" TEXT /* Status of the topic (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("topic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_topics_module_id FOREIGN KEY ("module_id") REFERENCES modules ("module_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "cohort_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the cohort the student is enrolled in */,
  "student_name" TEXT /* Full name of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the student */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the student */,
  "social_media_profiles" TEXT /* Social media profiles of the student */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date the student enrolled in the cohort */,
  "enrollment_status" TEXT /* Status of the student's enrollment (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_students_cohort_id FOREIGN KEY ("cohort_id") REFERENCES cohorts ("cohort_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instructors" (
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instructor */,
  "instructor_name" TEXT /* Full name of the instructor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the instructor */,
  "qualifications" TEXT /* Qualifications of the instructor */,
  "experience" TEXT /* Experience of the instructor */,
  "areas_of_expertise" TEXT /* Areas of expertise of the instructor */,
  "employment_status" TEXT /* Employment status of the instructor (e.g., full-time, part-time) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instructor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "student_progress" (
  "progress_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each progress record */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the student */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the course */,
  "module_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the module */,
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the topic */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the topic (e.g., Not Started, In Progress, Completed) */,
  "completion_date" TEXT /* Date the topic was completed */,
  "progress_notes" TEXT /* Notes on the student's progress */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("progress_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_progress_topic_id FOREIGN KEY ("topic_id") REFERENCES topics ("topic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_progress_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_progress_module_id FOREIGN KEY ("module_id") REFERENCES modules ("module_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_progress_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assessments" (
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assessment */,
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the topic */,
  "assessment_name" TEXT /* Name of the assessment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the assessment */,
  "assessment_type" TEXT /* Type of the assessment (e.g., quiz, assignment, project) */,
  "total_points" INTEGER /* Total points possible for the assessment */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Due date for the assessment */,
  "assessment_status" TEXT /* Status of the assessment (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assessment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assessments_topic_id FOREIGN KEY ("topic_id") REFERENCES topics ("topic_id")
)
